extraction_reasoning: The litigation table separates matters filed by and against each entity: I counted only the Against rows, excluding all By rows. Criminal proceedings against all listed entities total 24 (9 Company + 5 Promoters + 6 Group Companies + 4 Directors), statutory/regulatory proceedings against all listed entities total 95 (25 + 27 + 42 + 1), while tax proceedings against the Company and subsidiaries are 21; promoter and group-company tax rows were excluded because the table does not identify them as subsidiaries. The quantified amount against the Company is ₹462.24 million; no separate subsidiary row or aggregate against-company-and-subsidiaries total is stated, so this converts to ₹46.224 crore. Contingent liabilities are only referenced as being disclosed elsewhere, without a Total figure or date in the provided risk section. The concentration percentages disclosed are segment/property/geography figures for full financial years 2018, 2017 and 2016 based on revenue from operations, not company-wide top-five or top-ten customer concentration. The litigation source unit is ₹ million, converted to crore by dividing by 10 (₹462.24 million ÷ 10 = ₹46.224 crore).
